disclaimer: Repository audit only — no runtime verification. Describes existing MelegaSwapV2 code paths as of audit date. Forbidden surfaces (exchange.ts, contracts.ts, pools.tsx, wagmi.ts, router logic) were inspected read-only, not modified.

capabilities.label: Token listing
capabilities.contractDependency: None for listing — ERC-20/BEP-20 token contracts on-chain
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Users can import tokens by contract address into local wallet session. No protocol token-list submission UI. Asset registry indexes MARCO deployments read-only.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Wire Mission 12 submit_token_metadata to a real list-governance pipeline without duplicating ImportToken local-only flow.
capabilities.notes: Protocol listing ≠ user import. Do not conflate localStorage import with Melega listing.

capabilities.label: Token metadata / logo submission
capabilities.configDependency: Token logos from @pancakeswap/tokens package and list JSON; no upload pipeline
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: No logo or metadata upload UI. Logos resolved from bundled token metadata or block explorer fallbacks.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Define Labs → CDN → token list ingestion path before exposing upload UI. Mission 12 marks this PLANNED.

capabilities.label: Token list management
capabilities.configDependency: lists.ts — remote OFFICIAL_LISTS and DEFAULT_ACTIVE_LIST_URLS are empty; bundled JSON only
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Swap searches bundled default/warning/unsupported lists plus user-imported tokens. No admin UI to edit lists at runtime.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Audit which remote list URLs should be re-enabled vs Melega-curated list before production listing governance.
capabilities.notes: Remote list URLs intentionally empty in lists.ts — local JSON is primary source.

capabilities.label: Add liquidity
capabilities.contractDependency: PancakeSwap V2 Router + Factory (via exchange.ts); StableSwap contracts for stable pairs
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Live on BNB Chain, Ethereum, Polygon, Base. Wallet required. Real on-chain addLiquidity.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Link Mission 12 create_liquidity capability — already mapped to /add. No duplication.

capabilities.label: Remove liquidity
capabilities.contractDependency: PancakeSwap V2 Router + LP pair contracts
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Live on 4 chains. Wallet required. Real on-chain removeLiquidity.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Document in launch console as companion to add liquidity — no new UI needed.

capabilities.label: Create liquidity pool
capabilities.contractDependency: PancakeSwap V2 Factory.createPair (implicit on first addLiquidity for new pair)
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: New pools created when user adds first liquidity for unseen token pair — same /add flow, no separate wizard.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Mission 12 create_pool already links to /add — accurate. Consider UX label only.

capabilities.label: Create farm
capabilities.contractDependency: MasterChef — farm allocation is protocol-governed, not user-deployable
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Users can stake/harvest on existing farms. No UI to create new MasterChef pools. Mission 12 marks BLOCKED.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Mission 14 should define ops/governance farm allocation workflow — never expose fake user farm deploy.

capabilities.label: Farm configuration
capabilities.configDependency: Farm definitions in @pancakeswap/farms; LP APR JSON in config/constants/lpAprs/
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Farms rendered from static/package config. Changes require code deploy, not admin UI.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Index existing farms in venue registry (partially done) before any config UI.

capabilities.label: Create staking pool
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Users stake in protocol-defined syrup pools. No user-facing pool creation. Mission 12 marks PLANNED.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Separate participate (/pools) from create (governance) in Mission 14 ops layer.

capabilities.label: Pool configuration
capabilities.contractDependency: Sous Chef pool contracts per config entry
capabilities.configDependency: pools.tsx static sousId, contractAddress, staking/reward tokens
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Pool cards rendered from pools.tsx. No runtime admin editor.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Venue registry already indexes marco-stake-sous-0 — extend for full pool catalog.

capabilities.label: ILO / launch flow
capabilities.contractDependency: IFO contracts via ifo.ts config; Labs handoff not on-chain in DEX
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Legacy IFO pad LIVE on BSC only. Mission 12 Labs launch PLANNED. Economic activation read-model at /new-project.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Bridge /ilo legacy flow with Mission 12 launch_through_labs without duplicating IFO contracts.

capabilities.label: NFT routes
capabilities.configDependency: supportChains SUPPORT_CHAIN_NFT = BSC only for mint
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: DNFT mint BSC-only. View/market routes exist. Not part of core DEX launch layer.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Exclude NFT from Mission 14 factory scope unless explicitly requested.

capabilities.label: Swap routing
capabilities.contractDependency: V2 Router + pair contracts; StableSwap for stable pairs
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Live swap on 4 chains. V2 and stable-swap paths. Production swap logic — do not modify.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Mission 10 execution read-model must remain separate from live swap routing.

capabilities.label: Smart router usage
capabilities.contractDependency: PancakeSwap Smart Router contract (SMART_ROUTER_ADDRESS per chain)
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Optional Smart Router path when better than V2. User toggle in swap UI. Falls back to V2.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Do not conflate Smart Router with Mission 10 illustrative execution candidates.

capabilities.label: Wallet integration
capabilities.configDependency: wagmi.ts chain + connector config; WalletConnect project id in env
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: MetaMask, WalletConnect, Trust, Coinbase, Binance, Blocto, Ledger, Safe connectors. Multi-chain wallet switch.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Forbidden to modify for Mission 14 — consume wallet state only in new flows.
capabilities.notes: Audited read-only. wagmi.ts is forbidden surface.

capabilities.label: Chain support
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: Swap/liquidity/farms/pools: ETH, BSC, Base, Polygon. ILO/NFT mint/Zap/find: BSC only.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Align Mission 11 presence targets with supportChains gates before enabling new chain write flows.

capabilities.label: Admin / config-driven flows
capabilities.contractDependency: None for registry surfaces — read models only
capabilities.configDependency: Static registry data + public/registry/*.json manifests; menu config for feature visibility
capabilities.userFacingAvailability: No traditional /admin. Registry explorers and launch console are read-model/config indexed. Legacy DEX config via code deploy.
capabilities.recommendedNextAction: Mission 14: factory write layer should call existing LIVE flows first, registry second, never fake admin.

recommended_mission_14: Mission 14: DEX Factory Write Layer — wire Mission 12 capabilities to existing LIVE flows (/add, /remove, /swap) first; define governance ops path for farm/pool creation; do not duplicate router, MasterChef, or wallet surfaces.
highest_risk_gaps: create_farm — no user deploy; MasterChef governance only
create_staking_pool — no user deploy; pools.tsx static config
token_list_management — remote lists disabled; governance undefined
swap_routing / smart_router — production-critical; must not be modified by factory missions
reusable_flows: /add — add liquidity and implicit pool creation
Token import by address — ImportToken local session
